pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take:
"Mustard Boy thought Saudi Arabia's oil would fuel goals, but Ghost Pepper's Spain is about to fry that theory."

Look, Spain's been playin' some tiki-taka magic lately, while Saudi Arabia has been wishin' on a desert mirage hopin' for wins. Zach, "Mustard Boy," picked Saudi Arabia like he thought oil money would get 'em a Messi clone or somethin'. But boy, he’s about to learn today that Ghost Pepper's Spain is smokin' hot and ready to send that pick up in flames. I'm callin' it now — Spain is gonna serve up a spicy paella of goals in Atlanta, leavin' Mustard Boy reachin' for the water cooler. Devin's got this one in the bag; Ghost Pepper's turnin' up the heat, no doubt.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Brazilian Dreams Face Ghost Pepper Reality in Group H Clash
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy banking on the Saudis' tactical expertise to upset Spain.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden Backpass Assassin Sees Perfect 0-4 Strategy with Japan
pundit_takes.subtitle: Three non-qualified teams may be his secret World Cup weapon.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin's Ghost Pepper Tactics Poised to Light Up Mustard Boy
pundit_takes.subtitle: Spain expected to show Saudi Arabia a real sizzler in Atlanta.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe The Noisemaker Cruises to Top Rank Without Winning Anything
pundit_takes.subtitle: Knows nothing about soccer but everything about winning the pool.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe in first? The Noisemaker just schooled the veterans at their own game.
Rafe's first three picks were a joke, but he's having the last laugh.
Devin's -6 against Rafe is the gap you expect from a grand canyon.
Model loves Gunner, but his 2-spot slide shows the sim's slipping grip.
